title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCVII. Jingles.
content:
Hey ding a ding, what shall I sing?
        How many holes in a skimmer?
        Four and twenty, - my stomach is empty;
        Pray, mamma, give me some dinner.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCVII. Jingles." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
